title: The 'Vote' button should be under the posts rather than above them.
excerpt: The vote button is placed at the top which is not the usual place for user action buttons. This button should be placed under the posts next to the other action buttons like ‘bookmark’ and ‘like’ etc. I won’t vote until …

posts.author: Rua (Acorn)
posts.cookedHtml:
The vote button is placed at the top which is not the usual place for user action buttons. This button should be placed under the posts next to the other action buttons like ‘bookmark’ and ‘like’ etc. I won’t vote until after I read a post and so it makes sense to me to be at the bottom.

I believe most users don’t even know the Vote button exists. This positioning I believe would increase votes and hopefully show a true representation of the problems people are coming across as I assume the ‘votes’ is how the developers gauge whether to look into fixing/ changing something.
